titleStmt.title: SII 24.240: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 240. (A.R. No. 22 of 1936-37.) EAST WALL OF THE FOURTH PRĀKĀRA.

summary.p: Engraved in continuation of No. 228 Registers a remission of taxes on certain lands purchased by the bhaṭṭas of Kōdaṇḍarāma-chatur vēdimaṅgalam towards temple site, garden and sites for the watchmen. The record is dated the 2+1st year and 213th day of Tribhuvanachakravartin Kōnērinmaikoṇḍāṉ who may be identified with Māṟavarmaṉ Kulasēkhara II. Nārāyaṇaṉ Aṉantaṉ, a signatory in this record also figures in the record No. 241 below.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhu[vana*]cakravatti koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ kodaṇḍarāmaccaturveti maṅkalattu Akara bhaṭṭarkaḷukku taṅkaḷakarattukku vāstuvukkum Ivvakarattil Eḻuntaruḷuvikkiṟa nāyaṉār tiruviruppukkum tirunantavaṉattukkum nilamum grā mattukkuc cuṟṟil pāṭikāppār Uḷḷiṭṭār kuṭi Irukka veṇṭum nilamum tāṅkaḷ palaperāl vilaikoṇṭa nilattukku varum paṇamum nellum vāḻaippaḻa Amutum Aṭaikkāy Amutu pākkum nam kāṭ(c)ci Aṟaiyil celvarkkum māmpaḻattukku varum viḻukkāṭum maṟṟum Eppe
ṟpaṭṭa Upātikaḷum Uṭ(p)paṭa Iraṇṭāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu pacāṉa mutal vari Olaiyil kaḻittatu Ippaṭikku Iv volai piṭipāṭāka koṇṭu candrādityavarai cella kallilum cempilum veṭṭivittu Anubhavittuk koṇṭu potavum pāṟka . Ivai veṭcci Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu § yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu Etirāmāṇṭu nāḷ 2 100 10 3 kku Ivai ṉārāyaṇaṉ Aṉantaṉ Eḻuttu § tulyam §
Digital edition of SII 24.240 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
